title: Tech Mod Loot Crate
description: Tech Mod Loot Crate is a mod for skyblock-like gamemodes that allow people to acquire modded dusts easily. This means ALL DUST (even the OP ones, so lock em to other tags)! Currently for Forge 1.20.1, but I will port it to other versions, e.g. NF1.20.6.
body:
Tech Mod Loot Crate is a helper mod for other playstyles like Skyblock, allowing for simpler methods for the player to get through the game in the ENDLESS VOID. It's possible to get through a majority of the game with TMLC, and if used with the right mods, it should be beatable. TMLC will be continuosly updated for as long as possible.

# Why should I use this?
TMLC eliminates the need for other skyblock modpacks in a simpler and easier way than other mods like [Ex Deorum](https://modrinth.com/mod/ex-deorum).

# Features
- The brand new Dust Crate
- Wood Crate
- Ingot Crate
- Compressed Dirt from 9 Dirt (drops 10)
- Coal Shards from Dust Crates
- That's it for now...

# Recipes
Recipes are in the recipe book from the beginning. The only recipes not included are the following:
- Compressed Dirt: 9 dirt in a crafting grid
- Coal from Coal Shards: 4 shards in a grid
